name: Scratch Golf Club
about: Scratch Golf Club is a private, members-only golf simulation facility in Dallas. It provides an elite experience with tour-grade technology, including Trackman simulators, AI swing analysis, and slow-motion video. The facility is designed for golfers looking to improve their game through data-driven practice, offering 24/7 access via a mobile app. Membership is required to use the facility, with various tiers available to suit different needs and budgets.
why_golfers_like_it: Elite Trackman technology in every bay for accurate shot tracking
24/7 unlimited access with mobile app for ultimate convenience
AI-powered swing analysis and slow-motion video for detailed feedback
Multiple practice modes to simulate real course conditions
Private, distraction-free environment for focused practice

food_and_drink.notes: Members may bring their own food to enjoy during their reservation
Members may bring their own alcohol to enjoy during their reservation

simulator_hardware.notes: Radar-based launch monitor installed in every bay

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly state whether equipment is provided. It's recommended to bring your own clubs for the most authentic experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, Scratch Golf Club allows members to bring their own food and alcohol to enjoy during their reservation.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the time required to play 18 holes, but with 6 practice modes and simulator technology, golfers can simulate full rounds at their own pace.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No, Scratch Golf Club is a private, members-only facility focused on serious practice and improvement, and is not marketed as kid-friendly.
